encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

medications.name: albuterol sulfate 90 mcg/actuation HFA inhaler, 2 puffs as needed
medications.sig: 2 puffs inhaled as needed; may increase frequency to every 4-6 hours as needed for wheezing or cough
medications.reason: mild intermittent asthma; mild asthma exacerbation

document_references.description: Documents a nurse-triaged telephone call for URI symptoms and increased albuterol use. Includes clinical assessment of likely viral URI with mild asthma exacerbation, plan for symptomatic care and increased albuterol frequency, return precautions, and recommendation for COVID-19 testing.
